scripts.dev: node scripts/ensure-env.mjs && pnpm run clean && pnpm --filter @magic-link-sso/nextjs build && exec next dev --webpack -p 5001
scripts.build: node scripts/ensure-env.mjs && pnpm run clean && pnpm --filter @magic-link-sso/nextjs build && next build --webpack
scripts.format: oxfmt package.json tsconfig.json next.config.mjs postcss.config.mjs tailwind.config.ts vitest.config.ts src tests
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check package.json tsconfig.json next.config.mjs postcss.config.mjs tailwind.config.ts vitest.config.ts src tests
scripts.typecheck: node scripts/ensure-env.mjs && next typegen && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
